failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: train-only path-survival exit and risk-shape surface conditioning hold, stop, target, trail, and time-stop behavior on pre-entry closed-bar context
failure_asset.next_boundary: next C0003 work must change a meaningful path-conditioned exit, hold, risk-shape, label, model, or trade-shape surface; do not retry R0001 by only nudging score quantiles, stop or target multiples, trail distance, max-hold, or daily entry count
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: all 9 fold-isolated MT5 tick folds were losing and total fold-isolated tick net PnL was negative despite proxy entry frequency landing inside the target range

supporting_lessons.summary: Closed-bar logic parity passed exactly, but tick execution worsened total net PnL by 9.40 and reduced trade count by 369; tick execution remains the economic surface.
Path-conditioned risk profiles reached 5.18 proxy entries per active day but did not produce any profitable fold in MT5 tick mode.

hypothesis_variant.summary: test whether a train-only path-survival exit and risk-shape surface can improve US100 M5 MT5 tick economics by conditioning hold, stop, target, trail, and time-stop behavior on pre-entry closed-bar context
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: first C0003 true variant; changes the major question from entry selection to path-conditioned exit, hold, stop, target, and fixed-lot risk-shape logic, not a threshold, window, SLTP nudge, repair, or retry of C0001 or C0002

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution KPI management
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout
proxy must train or derive path-survival surfaces only inside each rolling train window
proxy must report entry frequency, path-quality diagnostics, and exit-shape diagnostics without creating selected claims
proxy result cannot decide whether MT5 is attempted
mechanical parity must compare scheduled entries, directions, exits, exit reasons, and position lifecycle behavior
tick-vs-closed-bar differences are execution divergence, not automatic logic failure

feature.summary: closed-bar pre-entry context for recent volatility, range expansion, close position, momentum decay, session phase, gap state, and prior adverse or favorable path tendency; no feature set is selected

label.summary: train-only forward path-quality labels for favorable excursion before adverse excursion, time-to-target versus time-to-stop, drawdown path, and exit survivability; no label is selected

model.summary: rolling train-only path-survival rule or score surface for choosing exit family, hold permission, and risk-shape bucket; no model family, objective, or score threshold is selected

trade_logic.summary: evaluate broad closed-bar long and short candidate events with fixed-lot discovery, then condition stop, target, trail, max-hold, and early-exit behavior on path-survival context before MT5 schedule replay
